title: Supervised Deep Learning Architectures: A High-Level Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the core components and data flow in a standard supervised deep learning model, from input to output and training.
relationships: Input Data flows forward through Feature Extraction and Fully Connected Layers to generate a Prediction
The Prediction and the True Label are compared by the Loss Function to calculate error
The error signal is propagated backwards via Backpropagation to compute gradients
The Optimizer uses these gradients to update the weights in all layers
